articles.title: NVIDIA Vera CPU Is ‘Packing a Heavy-Hitting Punch’ Against Competition
articles.summary: The shift to agentic AI creates a new CPU requirement for the AI factory: fast cores, massive memory bandwidth and the ability to sustain high performance when all cores are active. articles.title: Vera Arrives: NVIDIA’s First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs
articles.summary: The first NVIDIA Vera CPUs arrived at three of the world's leading AI labs on Friday — Anthropic in San Francisco, OpenAI in Mission Bay, SpaceXAI in Palo Alto — followed by a delivery to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in Santa Clara on Monday. NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.
